/home/scratch.huanhuanc_gpu/spmd/kokkos/bin/nvcc_wrapper -maxrregcount=32 -DKOKKOS_DEPENDENCE -arch=sm_90 CMakeFiles/jacobi_2d_kokkos.dir/jacobi_2d.cpp.o -o jacobi_2d_kokkos  kokkos/containers/src/libkokkoscontainers.a kokkos/algorithms/src/libkokkosalgorithms.a kokkos/simd/src/libkokkossimd.a kokkos/core/src/libkokkoscore.a /home/scratch.huanhuanc_gpu/spmd/cuda-toolkit/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs/libcuda.so /home/scratch.huanhuanc_gpu/spmd/cuda-toolkit/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so -ldl
